chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-4903 of 2018 CP No.D-3166 of 2011 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.21182/2021. 2. For hearing of CMA No.21555/2018. 3. For hearing of main case. 31.08.2021 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Saifullah, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ********** These matters pertain to infrastructure tax, on the subject matter numerous petitions have already been disposed of and leading the case is CP No.D-3309 of 2011. Learned counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of these two petitions in the same reasoning and conclusion. According, the judgment passed on CP No.D-3309 of 2011 shall apply mutatis mutandis to these proceedings and are accordingly disposed of. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the connected petition mentioned above. JUDGE JUDGE Khuhro/PA
